free_text: A resonance in the O-16 + He-3 reactions at 5.05 MeV
The 5.5 MeV Van de Graaff accelerator.
A beam current of 0.3 mu-A was used.
Two surface barrier detectors which were
movable in a 36 cm diam. scattering chamber.
A fixed detector at 45 degr. with respect to the beam
served as monitor by counting the 3He particles
elastically scattered by the target backing.
Targets were prepared by evaporating 30-40 mu-g/cm2
Error from the graphic bars. The error
bars contain errors from the use of different targets
No information about source of uncertainty
